summary: Baseline release of Lead Opportunity Dashboard
features: Executive Summary cards displaying lead overview, priority stars, GBP status, and organic rank.
Deterministic Opportunity Score (0-100) and weighted rating algorithms.
Google Business Profile matching engine with domain matching and city proximity filtering.
Technical Analysis consolidation of HTTPS, response status, canonical tags, and title/description metadata.
Outreach Strategy angles, Suggested First Email draft copy, and persistent manual annotations.
bugfixes: Added Cloudflare challenge interstitial title detection and Puppeteer browser fallback parser.
notes: Version 1.0 serves as the baseline dashboard release separating technical insights from business opportunities.

summary: Bulk analysis workflow and search results layout refinements
features: Added Analyse All Results bulk sequence execution engine.
Sequential analysis queue with live progressive progress indicators (e.g. Analysing 4 of 25...).
Smart caching and auto-restoration of Opportunity Score and View Analysis states on search refreshes.
Reordered Search Results table placing numeric Score column immediately after Position/Rating.
Subtle colored status indicators (Red/Orange/Green) for commercial opportunity levels.
Enabled client-side interactive sorting for Position/Rating, Score, and Domain/URL columns.
bugfixes: Fixed ReferenceError for fallbackOpportunity inside catch block when scraping fails.
notes: Version 1.1 focuses on search dashboard usability, sorting, and bulk auditing productivity gains.
